meaning: adj.饮食过量的,饮食奢侈的
examples: Myth #2. It's Just A Bunch Of Pampered Kids.
When was the last time you gave yourself permission to be pampered?
Moms love to be pampered and a facial is a wonderful relaxing way to do it.
The title character, played by Mia Farrow, is a pampered Upper East Side lady-who-lunches.
Employees are pampered with fat salaries, free lunch and a comprehensive medical scheme among other incentives.
